roa.docketEntryComment: ADD TO CAL RE ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION FILED
SIGNED ORDER FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY- FILED
FELONY PLEA TX FILED
DEFT ATC TO CANCEL ORDER TO EXAMINE SOURCE OF FUNDS FILED

/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/X:THIS DEFENDANT, ALONG WITH THE CO-DEFENDANT SAMUEL MINOR #18006475 ARE JOINTLY & SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR VICTIMRESTITUTION TO THESE VICTIMS/X: DEFENSE COUNSEL AND COUNSEL FOR THE PEOPLEHAVE ENTERED INTO A STIPULATION AS TO RESTITUTION OWED TO THE VICTIM IN THIS CASE, PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION, RESTITUTION IS TO BE SET AT $4,480,00PAYABLE TO THE VICTIM MEHMOOD & SAMAN KAHN AS WELL AS $2,000 TO VICTIM DOVBLOCH   PLUS 10% INTEREST PER YEAR (PC '1202,4(F)(3)(G)), AND AN ADMINISTRATIVE FEE OF UP TO 15% (PC '1203,1(1)), /X: THE COURT ORDERS THE DEFENDANTTO PAY RESTITUTION IN THE STIPULATED AMOUNT,/X: CR-110 AND CR-111 SIGNEDAND FILED/CCU/

/CAL:APD ATC FOR RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/X:REPORT INDICATES THE FOLLOWING VICTIMS AND REQUESTED RESTITUTION AMOUNTS:/X:MEHMOOD & SAMAN K, - $4,480,00/X:DOV B, - $2,000,00/CONTD:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DOPU:IF PD HASAUTHOROTY/

/CAL:SENTENCE/AJW/CH1:SP 16M:L/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 316DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 316 SAGE  FOR A TOTAL OF 632 DAYS/DNACOMP/STATES/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/PAR/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/X:SENTENCE IS TO RUN CONCURRENT WITH CASES 18002003& 19000840,/CTORD:SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED PURSUANT TO PC 1170(A)(3)/PAR11/PAROLE70/PAROLE UNIT2/PARDATE:08-19-19/PAR70/X:ORDER FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY SIGNED & FILED,/
